name: Sour Cream Cherry Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter two 8-inch-square cake pans.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter with sugar until well combined.
4. Add eggs one at a time and beat well.
5. Add sour cream and mix thoroughly.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
7. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture. The batter will be stiff.
8. Stir in the vanilla, zest, and cherry preserves.
9. Spread batter evenly in pans.
10. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Makes 2 cakes.
